title: Italian-Style Tortilla Tacos
description: A fusion twist on traditional tacos, this dish brings together Italian and Mexican flavors with crispy tortillas, savory meats, and a hint of Aussie corn.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces.
Add the Italian seasoning, garlic powder, and salt. Stir to combine.
While the meat cooks, warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
In a separate pan, cook the corn over medium heat until lightly toasted.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the meat mixture onto a tortilla and topping with toasted corn and a sprinkle of parsley.
